<!--
  MOVED. Page sources are now centralized under:
      data-raw/scripts/pages/

  This profile page's source is:
      data-raw/scripts/pages/README.Rmd

  Rebuild every page (root README.md, docs/*.md, the risk-management index,
  and the wiki) with a single command from the repository root:
      Rscript data-raw/scripts/render.R

  Do not edit this file or README.md directly — edit the source above.
-->
